title: Deeproot Cavern
summary: DM-only — the true source of Thornhold's resonance crystal.
excerpt: # Deeproot Cavern (DM) Beneath [[Raven's Vale]] lies a network of crystalline tunnels. The lord-mayor of [[Thornhold]] has been quietly extracting resonance crystal here for two decades. The deeper galleries are rumored to house something o

title: Raven's Vale
summary: A misty valley beneath Thornhold's bluffs.
excerpt: # Raven's Vale A long, mist-choked valley running south from [[Thornhold]]. Locals say the ravens that nest here can speak the names of those soon to die — a rumor most travelers prefer not to test.

title: The Old Keep
summary: A crumbling fortress whispered of in taverns.
excerpt: # The Old Keep Few travelers have laid eyes on the keep and returned with a clear story. Those who have speak of [[A Lost King]] — though no record of such a ruler exists in the chronicles of [[Sunhaven]].

title: Sunhaven
summary: The shining capital on the western shore.
excerpt: # Sunhaven Sunhaven is the seat of the realm and Astrath's largest port. Its merchants trade regularly with [[Thornhold]] and host pilgrims bound for [[The Old Keep]]. > "All roads in the west bend toward Sunhaven."

title: Thornhold
summary: A red-stone mining city carved into the southern bluffs.
excerpt: # Thornhold Thornhold is a fortified mining city perched above the [[Raven's Vale]]. It trades iron and rare resonance crystal with [[Sunhaven]] along the King's Road. ## History Founded after the Sundering, Thornhold's walls were raised fr
